content: React Router v8.0.1 is current (released after v7 just ~year ago). TanStack Router is alternative. For MEIME SPA (Vite, no SSR needed): React Router v8 library mode is the safe default — largest ecosystem, no migration friction, SPA-compatible. TanStack Router wins on TypeScript type-safety (typed search params, route trees) but adds complexity. Recommendation: React Router v8 in library mode (no framework mode needed) for MVP. Revisit TanStack Router if TS-first typing becomes a pain point.
